roa.docketEntryComment: Application and Order RE: Disposal of Exhibits Pursuant to PC 1417, et seq.
PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
NTC OF APPEAL,REQ FOR COURT-APP ATTY,NTC REGARDING RECORD ON APPEAL FILED
DA'S OPP TO DEFS MOT FOR NEW TRIAL; FILED
DEFT MOT FOR A NEW TR FILED AT INSISTENCE
DA SENTENCING MEMORANDUM FILED
DEFT'S PC1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS EVIDENCE FILED AT INSISTENCE

/TWS/CH1:ISS:CPROB:PROB 3 Y:PJ 30 D/CTS: 1/SWAPD: 04-16-18/PF390 12/VF2:150/FOP1: 3 MONTH/X: THE DEFENDANT HAS PRESENTED PROOF OF COMPLETION OF ATHREE MONTH FIRST OFFENDER PROGRAM AND THE COURT DEEMS THIS REQUIREMENT COMPLETE,/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT IS TO ATTEND TWO AA MEETINGS PER WEEK FOR A PERIOD OFSIX MONTHS/LVAL/LCHEM/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CITE/EMAT/1463ALC/BKFEE/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 100 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/X: THE SAME SENTENCE IS IMPOSED ON BOTH COUNTS AND THE SENTENCES ARE CONCURRENT,/X: THE BASE FINE IS IMPOSED ON COUNT ONE ONLY,/
/TRL PHASE JD/X: AT 4:20PM, THE JURY SIGNALS IT HAS REACHED VERDICTS,/X:THE VERDICTS ARE GUILTY TO BOTH COUNTS, AND THE ALLEGATIONS ARE FOUND TO BETRUE,/CONTD: SENTENCE/DOPC/

/CAL: MOTIONS IN LIMINE/CAL: PC 1538,5 MOTION TO SUPPRESS/WIT SWORN: BRANDI STEPHENS, CHP/WIT SWORN: MARIO SOLANO, CHP/ARG&SUB/MO DENIED/X: THE DEFENSE MOTION IN LIMINE IN REGARD TO A STATEMENT MADE BY THE DEFENDANT AT THE SCENE IS GRANTED,/X: THE PROCESS OF VOIR DIRE BEGINS,/CONTD: CONCLUSION OF JURY SELECTION/
/CAL:TRIAL & MTS/LD:01-23-18 (STW)/CONT/DEF:IS PLACED ON A 2 HOURS STANDBY/X:PEOPLE'S OPPOSITION TO DEFENSE MOTION TO SUPPRESS PURSUANT TO PC 1538,5 IS FILED,/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/MVARS/X:REQUESTFOR SCRAM IS DENIED,/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO ATTEND 1 AA MEETING PER WEEK & TOCONSUME NO ALCOHOL/GTWM/X:977 WAIVER ACCEPTED BY COURT AND FILED IN THE DOCKET,/CONTD:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DAWF/
/CAL:HRG TO READ REMITTITUR ONTO THE RECORD/TEXT:JUDGMENT AFFIRMED; REMITTITUR SPREAD UPON MINUTES/
